zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Knightley II於大約1186年出生在英國斯塔福爾麗莉時，他的父親Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley27歲，母親Beatrice De Knightley27歲。他於大約1219年與Agnes d'Oyly結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1254年在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Knightley II于大约1186年出生在英国斯塔福爾麗莉时，他的父亲Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley27岁，母亲Beatrice De Knightley27岁。他于大约1219年与Agnes d'Oyly结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1254年在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Knightley II was born about 1186, in Knightley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley, was 27 and his mother, Beatrice De Knightley, was 27. He married Agnes d'Oyly about 1219. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1254, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Knightley II est né environ 1186, à Knightley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Beatrice De Knightley, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Agnes d'Oyly environ 1219. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1254, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Knightley II um 1186 in Knightley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley 27 und seine Mutter Beatrice De Knightley 27. Er hat um 1219 Agnes d'Oyly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1254 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Knightley II è nato il circa 1186 nel Knightley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice De Knightley, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Agnes d'Oyly circa 1219. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1254, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Knightley IIが約1186年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアナイトリーで生まれた時，父Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightleyは27歳，母Beatrice De Knightleyは27歳であった。約1219年にAgnes d'Oylyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1254年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Knightley II(이)가 대략 1186년 영국 스태퍼드실르 나이틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice De Knightley(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1219년 Agnes d'Oyly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1254년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Knightley II nasceu aproximadamente 1186, em Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice De Knightley, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes d'Oyly aproximadamente 1219. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1254, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Knightley II родился около 1186 г. в местности нагтли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice De Knightley, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes d'Oyly около 1219 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1254 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Knightley II nació aproximadamente 1186, en Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Jorden De Chitteleia DeKnightley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Beatrice De Knightley, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Agnes d'Oyly aproximadamente 1219. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1254, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
